history.title: About Prime Casino
history.description1: Prime Casino stands out with welcome offers, free spins, and prize-driven promotions. Our casino also adds tournaments, Golden Chips, and Prize Twister rewards to the gaming experience.
history.description2: Prime Casino is an online casino where we bring slots, live casino, table games, instant win titles, and regular promotions into one gaming environment. Our casino has been active since 2005 and is powered by the SkillOnNet platform, helping us support a large game library and frequent new releases. The lobby includes more than 6,000 games, from classic slots and jackpot slots to Megaways, Slingo, video poker, video bingo, scratch cards, Plinko, and crash games.
history.description3:
For table game players, we offer blackjack, roulette, baccarat, craps, Sic Bo, and poker-style titles. In the live casino section, players can find real-dealer roulette, blackjack, baccarat, live poker, and game shows from major studios. We focus not only on game volume, but also on discovery, with categories, new releases, popular picks, and featured sections.

Events and entertainment at Prime Casino are built around tournaments, seasonal promotions, Daily Picks, and themed campaigns. Daily Picks brings current and personalized promotions into one practical area. Slot tournaments include daily buy-in events and freerolls, while special competitions may appear around holidays and notable occasions. The Hot/Cold feature helps players browse slot trends and updates every five minutes. My Levels adds a progression layer, where spins, stakes, and game rounds help move players forward while progress is shown inside the account. Our bonus selection includes a welcome bonus up to C$100, 151 free spins, Free Spins for a Year, Saturday’s Prize Twister, and Golden Chips for live table games. We also support a secure environment with SSL encryption, audited RNG gameplay, and responsible gaming tools. Prime Casino is designed for players who value variety, mobile access, regular updates, and a clear promotions structure.

customHtml.title: Prime Casino: your comfort — rules, security, support
customHtml.description:
Prime Casino Visiting Rules and Responsible Play

Prime Casino operates as an online casino, so access rules are connected with account registration, identity checks, payments, real-money gaming, and responsible use of the platform. Real-money play is available only to players who meet the legal minimum age, which cannot be lower than 18. We may request proof of age, identity, address, payment ownership, and source of funds when required. Accepted checks may include passport, driving licence, official ID, utility bill, bank statement, card information with protected digits, or payment documentation. Registration details must be accurate, because incorrect or misleading information can affect account access and withdrawals. Each player should use their own account only, and linked or duplicate accounts may be restricted if they are used to bypass rules. Payment methods should belong to the account holder, while third-party methods may require extra documentation. Transfers between players are not permitted. Withdrawal requests must be submitted through the withdrawal page inside the casino software. Active bonuses may affect withdrawals, because unused bonus balances and related winnings can be removed if bonus conditions are not completed. Technical abuse, software manipulation, AI tools, unfair advantage systems, and exploitation of malfunctions are not allowed. Gameplay and transactions may be reviewed for compliance with terms, bonus rules, AML checks, and responsible gaming standards. We support deposit limits, play limits, cooling-off, temporary suspension, and self-exclusion. Gambling should remain entertainment, not a way to earn income. Players are encouraged to avoid chasing losses and to monitor account history regularly.


Access Conditions

  • • Minimum age is 18 or higher where local law requires it.
  • • Registration must include accurate personal details.
  • • Real-money play may require identity verification.
  • • Certain jurisdictions or features may be restricted.

Documents and Verification

  • • Identity proof may include passport, driving licence, or official ID.
  • • Address proof may include a current bill or bank statement.
  • • Payment ownership may be checked before withdrawals.
  • • Source-of-funds checks may be requested for AML duties.

Not Allowed

  • • Duplicate accounts must not be used to bypass rules.
  • • Third-party payment methods require additional checks.
  • • Chargebacks, technical abuse, and malfunction exploitation are prohibited.
  • • AI tools or unfair advantage software are not allowed.

Responsible Play

  • • Deposit limits and play restrictions help manage activity.
  • • Cooling-off, temporary suspension, and self-exclusion are available.
  • • Account history can be reviewed to track spending.
  • • Gambling should stay within personal and financial limits.

Prime Casino Licence, Data Protection, and Privacy

Prime Casino operates under the oversight of the Malta Gaming Authority, and our official materials state that game fairness, player protection, and data safety are part of our regulated operating environment. This means our casino follows structured procedures for identity checks, fair gaming, anti-money laundering controls, and responsible gaming standards. We also use tested RNG gameplay to support fair outcomes across casino games.


Data protection at Prime Casino includes 128-bit SSL encryption, while our Privacy Policy also describes TLS 1.2, ECDHE_RSA with X25519, and AES_128_GCM for secure transmission. These protections apply to sensitive actions such as account access, deposits, withdrawals, and personal data transfer. Our aim is to keep information encrypted and authenticated while it moves between the player and Prime Casino.


Our Privacy Policy explains which information may be collected and why it is used. Personal data may include full name, date of birth, home address, email, phone number, payment details, IP address, device information, and activity on the platform. Non-personal data may include browser type, operating system, language settings, access time, and technical usage information.


We use data to create accounts, verify identity, process payments, provide support, personalize services, meet legal duties, perform AML checks, prevent fraud, and analyse potentially risky gaming behaviour. External service providers may support payment processing, verification, IT services, analytics, auditing, legal compliance, and responsible gaming checks. These partners are required to handle information with an appropriate level of protection.


Prime Casino also explains player rights over personal data. These may include access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, portability, and objection to certain processing activities. Requests may require identity verification so that personal information is not released to unauthorized individuals.


Cookies support secure areas, registration, functionality, preferences, analytics, and personalization. Players can manage cookies through browser settings, although disabling strictly necessary cookies may affect access to key parts of the site. This approach helps us balance convenience, account security, and a smoother casino experience.


Prime Casino Deposits, Withdrawals, and Payment Security

Prime Casino supports popular payment methods for deposits and withdrawals, including Visa, Master­card, pay­safe­card, PayPal, Trustly, Skrill, Payz, SOFORT, and Apple Pay. Our terms also mention additional methods such as Fast Bank Transfer, Instant Payments by Citadel, INTERAC, and WebMoney, although actual availability depends on the cashier inside the player account. The minimum deposit shown on the payment page is C$10. The minimum withdrawal amount is C$20. Withdrawals require a real-money balance, at least one successful deposit, and completed checks where requested. Before a payout is processed, we may request proof of identity, proof of address, payment ownership, and source-of-funds information. Withdrawals are normally returned to the same method used for deposits where possible. Card deposits may be paid back to the card for at least the deposited amount, while remaining funds can be paid through an alternative method. E-wallet deposits are usually returned to the same e-wallet. A withdrawal request stays pending until midnight GMT on the following day, then moves to the Accounts Department for processing on the next business day if all required information is available. Once fully processed, funds are sent without additional casino-side delay. In certain countries, Trustly or Entercash withdrawals may be processed within minutes if no extra documents are needed. The maximum withdrawal amount per transaction is the equivalent of C$5,000, while the maximum cashout of winnings is the equivalent of C$10,000 every 30 days, with larger winnings paid in installments.


Method Deposit speed Payout after approv­al
Visa Usually fast After pro­cess­ing
Master­card Usually fast After bank pro­cess­ing
pay­safe­card Usually fast After approv­al
PayPal Usually fast After wallet pro­cess­ing
Trustly Near instant con­fir­ma­tion Minutes where avail­able
Skrill Usually fast After wallet pro­cess­ing
Payz Usually fast After wallet pro­cess­ing
SOFORT Near instant con­fir­ma­tion After pro­cess­ing
Apple Pay Usually fast Method de­pend­ent

Withdrawal Limits

  • • Minimum withdrawal: C$20.
  • • Maximum per transaction: equivalent of C$5,000.
  • • Maximum winnings cashout: equivalent of C$10,000 every 30 days.
  • • Daily limit: not separately published; transaction and 30-day limits apply.
  • • Large wins from C$5,000 or jackpot wins may require extra verification.

Prime Casino Customer Support

Prime Casino customer support is built around clear digital channels and practical help with accounts, payments, bonuses, documents, and technical questions. The main fast-contact option is live chat, available after logging in. Chat fast-contact option is live chat, available after support operates from 06:00 to 00:00 GMT. This channel is useful for questions about missing bonuses, delayed payments, frozen games, document uploads, or account checks. Email support is available at any time, which makes it suitable outside live chat hours. Email is also helpful for detailed cases, attachments, technical descriptions, or account-specific reviews. The official contact page does not list phone support as a primary public channel, so chat and email remain the main options. Service quality depends on the clarity of the request: transaction dates, game names, bonus names, and screenshots can help support review an issue faster. Document-related questions should be handled through the Upload Docs area, because documents sent through other channels may not be accepted. Support can help explain bonus rules, but account-specific offers are always reviewed according to the player profile. For payments, the team can check deposits, withdrawals, pending requests, and verification steps. Responsible gaming support can help with limits, cooling-off, self-exclusion, or blocking promotional offers. The main CA version of the site is in English, while some related brand environments may support other languages. The terms state that the English version prevails where translations differ. For accurate help, messages should be sent from the email address linked to the account.


Contact Channels

  • • Live chat is available after login from 06:00 to 00:00 GMT.
  • • Email support can be contacted at any time.
  • • Phone support is not listed as a main public channel.
  • • Report a problem can be used for technical issues.

Response Time and Service Quality

  • • Chat is suitable for quick account, bonus, and payment questions.
  • • Email is useful for detailed cases and document-related issues.
  • • Clear details can help the support team review faster.
  • • Payment cases may require verification before resolution.

Languages and Availability

  • • The main CA site version is available in English.
  • • Some SkillOnNet-related brand environments support multiple languages.
  • • English terms prevail if translated versions differ.
  • • Account-specific answers are based on official rules and account data.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at Prime Casino
customHtml_2.description:
Prime Casino My Levels and Player Rewards

At Prime Casino, the loyalty-style experience is built around My Levels, a progression feature that rewards regular casino activity. It is different from a traditional VIP club because progress is visible inside the account and connected to actual play. Every spin or game round can help move the player toward the next level. The feature page explains that progress is displayed through a progress meter, making it easy to follow advancement. The main casino page also states that each level requires 125 points. Points are connected with spins and stakes, and the progress can be tracked from the account area. A key benefit of My Levels is that once a level is reached, the player does not drop back to a lower level. Rewards may vary by level, so the exact available prize should be checked in the account. Daily Picks adds another personalized layer by showing current and upcoming promotions in one place. We also support the player journey with welcome offers, free spins, Golden Chips, Prize Twister, tournaments, and themed campaigns. New players may see a 100% welcome bonus up to C$100 with a C$10 minimum deposit. Another welcome option includes 151 free spins on Big Bass Splash with a C$10 minimum deposit and the code PrimeBB. Free Spins for a Year includes 10 free spins every week for a year, 520 free spins in total, with a C$50 minimum deposit and the code PC365. Golden Chips provide 10 chips worth C$0.25 each for selected PlayTech Live Table Games with a qualifying deposit. Saturday’s Prize Twister may award free spins, bonus funds, cash prizes, or a jackpot up to C$25,000. All rewards are subject to their own terms, wagering requirements, time limits, maximum bet rules, and the Bonus Policy.


Registration Conditions

  • • A Prime Casino account is required to track progress.
  • • Spins and game rounds help move the progress meter.
  • • Each level requires 125 points.
  • • Progress is displayed inside the account area.
  • • Reached levels do not drop back down.

Levels and How to Reach Them

  • • Starting progress begins through regular casino activity.
  • • The next level is reached after collecting 125 points.
  • • Points are linked to spins and stakes.
  • • Rewards are shown in the account and may vary by level.
  • • Daily Picks displays personalized and current promotions.

Available Reward Formats

  • • Welcome Bonus: 100% up to C$100, minimum deposit C$10.
  • • 151 Free Spins: Big Bass Splash, minimum deposit C$10, code PrimeBB.
  • • Free Spins for a Year: 520 total spins, minimum deposit C$50, code PC365.
  • • 50% Bonus: up to C$50 within the Free Spins for a Year offer.
  • • Golden Chips: 10 chips worth C$0.25 each for selected live table games.
  • • Prize Twister: free spins, bonus, cash prizes, or a jackpot up to C$25,000.
  • • Tournaments: daily slot competitions, including freerolls and buy-ins.

Prime Casino Bonuses, Prizes, Special Offers, and Tournaments

Prime Casino promotions are not limited to My Levels, because separate offers are available for welcome play, live tables, slots, weekly rewards, and tournaments. The main welcome bonus is a 100% match up to C$100 on the first deposit from C$10. This offer includes wagering requirements, a time limit, and a maximum bet rule for bonus play. Another starting option is 151 free spins on Big Bass Splash with a first deposit from C$10 and the code PrimeBB. Free Spins for a Year is designed as a long-running reward, with 10 free spins every week for a year and 520 free spins in total. This offer requires a first deposit from C$50 with the code PC365 and also includes a 50% bonus up to C$50. Saturday’s Prize Twister is a separate weekend promotion where a qualifying deposit gives access to a Prize Twister spin. Prize Twister may award free spins, rewards, cash prizes, or a jackpot up to C$25,000. Live Table Golden Chips are available for selected PlayTech Live Table Games: a deposit from C$10 with a bonus code credits 10 Golden Chips. Each Golden Chip has a value of C$0.25. Tournaments at Prime Casino include daily slot-based competitions, buy-in events, and freerolls. Special tournaments may also appear around holidays and notable occasions. Daily Picks helps show current and upcoming promotions in one place. Hot/Cold is not a bonus, but it supports game discovery by showing slot trends updated every five minutes. New and returning players may see different promotions depending on account status, activity, and offer conditions. All bonuses should be reviewed together with wagering rules, expiry dates, eligible games, maximum bet limits, and withdrawal conditions.


Welcome Offers

  • • 100% Bonus up to C$100: first deposit from C$10.
  • • 151 Free Spins: Big Bass Splash, deposit from C$10, code PrimeBB.
  • • Free Spins for a Year: 520 total free spins, deposit from C$50, code PC365.
  • • 50% Bonus up to C$50: included in the Free Spins for a Year offer.

Special Promotions

  • • Saturday’s Prize Twister: a weekly promotional spin after a qualifying deposit.
  • • C$25,000 Jackpot: top Prize Twister prize.
  • • Free Spins: one of the possible Prize Twister rewards.
  • • Cash Prizes: a direct prize type inside the promotion.
  • • Bonus Rewards: extra promotional funds under offer rules.

Live Casino Rewards

  • • 10 Golden Chips: available with a deposit from C$10 and a code.
  • • C$0.25 chip value: value of each Golden Chip.
  • • PlayTech Live Table Games: main eligible category.
  • • Excluded titles: Live Slots, Buffalo Blitz, Everybody’s Jackpot, and Deal or No Deal.

Tournaments and Events

  • • Daily Tournaments: regular slot competitions.
  • • Freerolls: tournament play with no buy-in.
  • • Buy-in Events: paid-entry tournament formats.
  • • Holiday Tournaments: special competitions on notable dates.
  • • Daily Picks: a personalized area for current promotions.

Prime Casino Games and Bet Types

Prime Casino is a classic online casino, so our core product is built around casino games rather than sports betting. The lobby includes more than 6,000 games across slots, live casino, table games, instant win, video poker, video bingo, and Slingo. Slots are a central category and include classic slots, new releases, jackpot slots, Mega­ways, themed titles, and exclusive selections. Jackpot King and jackpot slots are available for players who enjoy large-prize mechanics. Mega­ways slots provide a dynamic reel structure and a fast round rhythm. Slingo combines slot and bingo elements, making it different from traditional reel games. Live casino includes roulette, blackjack, baccarat, live poker, and game shows with real dealers. Evolution and Playtech are among the key live casino providers. Online roulette includes popular variants such as European Roulette, French Roulette, and American Roulette. Blackjack is available in RNG and live formats, giving players a choice between quick digital rounds and real-table atmosphere. Baccarat includes classic versions and related live formats such as Bac Bo. Video poker includes Jacks or Better, Deuces Wild, Louisiana Bonus, single-hand, multi-hand, and multiplier-enhanced options. Video bingo offers fast bingo-style play with an RNG ball selector and bonus features. Instant win includes scratch cards, Keno, Plinko, and crash games. Table games also include craps and Sic Bo. Each game has its own rules, bet limits, RTP, volatility, and bonus-balance availability, so the details should be checked in the game information card.


Slots

  • • Classic slots: familiar reel and payline gameplay.
  • • Jackpot slots: games with large prize-pool mechanics.
  • • Mega­ways: changing win-path structures.
  • • Themed slots: stories, characters, features, and bonus rounds.
  • • Exclusive slots: selected Prime Casino collections.

Live Casino

  • • Live Roulette: real dealer and streamed table action.
  • • Live Blackjack: card rounds hosted in real time.
  • • Live Baccarat: classic banker-player gameplay.
  • • Live Poker: casino-style poker variants.
  • • Game Shows: entertainment-focused live formats.

Table Games

  • • Blackjack: RNG and live versions.
  • • Roulette: European, French, and American variants.
  • • Baccarat: classic and modern formats.
  • • Craps: dice-based table gameplay.
  • • Sic Bo: fast three-dice action.

Other Categories

  • • Video Poker: Jacks or Better, Deuces Wild, and more.
  • • Video Bingo: quick RNG bingo rounds.
  • • Slingo: a blend of slots and bingo.
  • • Instant Win: fast games with immediate results.
  • • Plinko and Crash: modern instant-win formats.

Prime Casino Minimum and Maximum Bets

At Prime Casino, bet limits depend on the selected game, provider, mode, and whether an active bonus is being used. The clearest public bonus-play guideline is a maximum bet of C$5 or 10% of the bonus amount, whichever is lower. Some promotional values use C$0.10 as a reference point, including free spin value and minimum bonus-bet wording. Exact real-money limits should be checked in the information card of the selected slot, instant-win title, or live table.


Game Type Min Bet Max Bet
Slots From C$0.10 in some formats Varies by game
Jack­pot Slots Game de­pend­ent Jack­pot de­pend­ent
Live Black­jack Table de­pend­ent Table de­pend­ent
Live Rou­lette Table de­pend­ent Table de­pend­ent
Bac­carat Table de­pend­ent Table de­pend­ent
In­stant Win Game de­pend­ent Game de­pend­ent
Golden Chips C$0.25 per chip Live-table rules
Bonus Play C$0.10 ref­er­ence C$5 or 10%

Prime Casino Tournaments and Leaderboards

Prime Casino runs slot tournaments that turn regular gameplay into a competitive experience. Our casino offers daily slot-based tournaments, including freerolls and buy-in events. Freerolls allow entry without a buy-in, while buy-in tournaments follow the entry rules shown for the specific event. Special tournaments may also appear around holidays, seasonal promotions, and notable dates. Point scoring depends on the specific tournament and is shown in the tournament information card. Depending on the format, scoring may consider spins, stake size, win amount, multipliers, net win, total score, or special tasks. The leaderboard shows the player’s position and helps track current ranking. A leaderboard position may change until the event ends because other players continue scoring points. Prizes are normally awarded according to tournament rules after the event ends and results are checked. If the prize is a bonus, free spins, or cash reward, extra conditions may apply. To participate correctly, players should use eligible games and follow the event time limits.


How to Participate

  • • Choose a tournament from the tournaments area or Daily Picks.
  • • Check whether it is a freeroll or buy-in event.
  • • Review eligible games, timing, and scoring rules.
  • • Play the listed slots before the event closes.

How Points Are Scored

  • • Spins may count toward the tournament score.
  • • Stakes may matter if the rules include bet size.
  • • Wins may be scored by round or total amount.
  • • Multipliers may improve score in selected formats.
  • • Special tasks may be used in themed events.

How to Claim a Prize

  • • Wait until the tournament ends and results are checked.
  • • Review the final leaderboard position.
  • • Receive the prize according to the event rules.
  • • Bonus prizes may include wagering requirements.

How to Track Ranking

  • • The leaderboard shows current tournament position.
  • • Ranking can change until the event finishes.
  • • Progress depends on points and other players’ activity.
  • • End time and tie-break rules should be checked.

items.title: Where can I find my deposit and withdrawal history?
items.answer: Deposit, withdrawal, and game history are available in the casino software. For a longer history period, support can be contacted.

items.title: Why may Prime Casino ask for documents?
items.answer: Documents may be required to confirm age, identity, address, payment ownership, source of funds, AML checks, and account security.

items.title: Can I change my account currency?
items.answer: The terms state that currency is assigned during registration based on the most logical location. If the first deposit is made in another available currency, the account currency may be updated to that currency, but free currency switching may not be available afterward.

items.title: Does Hot/Cold change the chance of winning?
items.answer: No. Hot/Cold shows current slot trends, but it does not guarantee a win or change the mathematical setup of the game.

items.title: Can I opt out of bonuses?
items.answer: Yes, support can help block promotional bonuses or cancel a bonus under the applicable rules.
